about: BTS The Garage Adfa, also shown as Bindings Tyre Service, is a small Mid-Wales tyre garage serving Adfa, Newtown, Welshpool and surrounding Powys with tyre fitting, wheel alignment and call-out support.

visual_score.notes: Dated dark template, small sidebar contact area, no strong above-fold call-to-action, email visible but no modern booking flow. Real local imagery helps trust but the page still looks old and conversion-light.
